canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement #1770 by moving startup/start-context adapter ownership behind the startup runtime module without changing emitted start payloads.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not implement #1771, #1772, or #1773 in this slice; preserve generated command semantics and start selector/tiny payload contracts.
